channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Eggs added to FDA's updated healthy claim food list
item.description: The health values of eggs have long been considered high in cholesterol and therefore, a risk to Americans’ health. However, research conducted by the FDA indicates that the cholesterol level in eggs does not negatively affect the body’s cholesterol levels as once believed.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, Fox 5

item.title: Man arraigned on murder charges in NYC subway death fanned flames with a shirt, prosecutors say
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The man accused of burning a woman to death inside a New York City subway train used a shirt to fan the flames, a prosecutor said Tuesday at his arraignment on murder charges. Sebastian Zapeta, 33, who federal immigration officials said is a Guatemalan citizen who entered the U.S.
item.dc:creator: CEDAR ATTANASIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: California residents on edge as high surf and flooding threats persist on Christmas Eve
item.description: SANTA CRUZ, Calif. (AP) — Persistent high surf and flooding threats along California’s coast had residents on high alert a day after a major storm was blamed for one man’s death and the partial collapse of a pier, which propelled three people into the Pacific Ocean.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA MENDOZA and STEFANIE DAZIO, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Mega Millions jackpot climbs to $1B ahead of Christmas Eve drawing
item.description: The Mega Millions jackpot could become the Christmas gift of a lifetime for a lucky lottery player ahead of Tuesday night’s drawing. The jackpot now stands at an estimated value of $1 billion, California Lottery officials announced on X.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KTLA 5

item.title: NORAD's Santa tracker was a Cold War morale boost. Now it attracts millions of kids
item.description: The Christmas tradition has become nearly global in scope: Children from around the world track Santa Claus as he sweeps across the earth, delivering presents and defying time. Each year, at least 100,000 kids call into the North American Aerospace Defense Command to inquire about Santa’s location.
item.dc:creator: BEN FINLEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fire alarm scare forces evacuations from Eiffel Tower
item.description: The entire tower was closed temporarily, but access to the first two floors was quickly restored, according to Newsweek.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, NewsNation

item.title: Trump vows to direct DOJ to pursue death penalty in wake of Biden clemencies
item.description: President-elect Trump vowed Tuesday to direct his Department of Justice (DOJ) to pursue the death penalty in the wake of President Biden’s clemencies of nearly every federal death row inmate.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: NFL on Netflix: Christmas Day games are a 1st for streaming giant
item.description: Netflix will have one of its biggest days Wednesday since the site launched in 1998 when it airs two NFL games for the first time. “NFL Christmas Gameday on Netflix” begins with a two-hour pregame show at 11 a.m., before Pittsburgh hosts Kansas City. Baltimore faces Houston in the second game.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Eye drops recalled nationwide due to fungal contamination
item.description: Check your medicine cabinets: A brand of eye drops sold nationally has been recalled due to the presence of fungus, which may cause vision damage.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Self, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bill Clinton discharged after hospitalization for flu
item.description: Former President Clinton was discharged Tuesday morning after being hospitalized a day earlier for flu, according to his spokesperson.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Seafarers move global trade — and Christmas gifts. These ministries bring them holiday cheer
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — On a balmy December evening, four Indian crew members, eager to go explore this Mediterranean city where their container ship docked for a few hours, turned for help to Stella Maris.
item.dc:creator: GIOVANNA DELL’ORTO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Second US Navy fighter jet narrowly avoided being shot down in 'friendly fire' incident: source
item.description: An F/A-18 Super Hornet – flying a few miles behind the Hornet that was shot down in a "friendly fire" incident over the Red Sea – took evasive maneuvers after a second surface-to-air missile was fired from the cruiser USS Gettysburg, a source with knowledge of the incident tells Fox News.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fire alarm scare forces evacuations from Eiffel Tower
item.description: The evacuation came less than a month after one of Paris' other signature landmarks, Notre Dame Cathedral, reopened following a devastating 2019 fire.
item.dc:creator: Bill Disbrow, Fox 5

item.title: US and UK criticize Pakistani military court convictions of civilian supporters of Imran Khan
item.description: ISLAMABAD (AP) — The United States and the United Kingdom have expressed concern over convictions imposed by Pakistani military courts to 25 civilian supporters of former Prime Minister Imran Khan over their alleged involvement in riots last year.
item.dc:creator: MUNIR AHMED, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Walmart illegally opened bank accounts for 1 million drivers, lawsuit alleges
item.description: Walmart and fintech company Branch Messenger are being sued by the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau for allegedly forcing more than one million delivery workers to use expensive deposit accounts to access their paychecks.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, NewsNation

item.title: Georgia homeowner arrested after attempting to remove squatter
item.description: Loletha Hale said police have been unhelpful and she can't fathom why she was arrested and charged with criminal trespassing.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Walmart illegally opened bank accounts for 1 million drivers, lawsuit alleges
item.description: Walmart and fintech company Branch Messenger are being sued by the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau for allegedly forcing more than one million delivery workers to use expensive deposit accounts to access their paychecks.
item.dc:creator: Kyler Swaim, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Husbands who abused adopted sons in 'house of horrors' slapped with massive prison sentences
item.description: A Georgia couple that pleaded guilty to sexually abusing their two adopted sons will now spend 100 years in prison without the possibility of parole.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: American Airlines experiences 'technical issue' with all flights on Christmas Eve
item.description: American Airlines is reportedly experiencing delays on the morning of Christmas Eve due to what the airline called a "technical issue.
item.dc:creator: Abigail Jones, KRON4

item.title: American Airlines nationwide ground stop lifted
item.description: American Airlines is experiencing technical issues that have affected their morning flights, according to American Airlines.
item.dc:creator: Ashley Suter, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Dem strategists admit party brand has gone downhill after election and more top headlines
item.description: Get all the stories you need-to-know from the most powerful name in news delivered first thing every morning to your inbox.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Victim's father angered at 'despicable' timing of death sentence commutation
item.description: A Michigan man said he doesn't disagree with President Joe Biden's decision to commute the death sentence of his daughter's killer, but he called the timing "despicable.
item.dc:creator: Ken Kolker, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nordstrom to be acquired by Nordstrom family and a Mexican retail group for $6.25B
item.description: ntury-old department store Nordstrom has agreed to be acquired and taken private by Nordstrom family members and a Mexican retail group for $6.25 billion, the company said Monday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Biden gives life in prison to 37 of 40 federal death row inmates
item.description: The move spares the lives of people convicted in killings, including the slayings of police and military officers, people on federal land and those involved in deadly bank robberies or drug deals, as well as the killings of guards or prisoners in federal facilities.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Virginia woman faces jail time after practicing illegal dentistry
item.description: A Virginia woman has been convicted of practicing dentistry without a license, following accusations that she illegally performed veneer procedures at her tooth jewelry business.
item.dc:creator: Karina F. Garcia, ABC 4

item.title: Pickup truck driver killed by police after driving through busy mall store is identified
item.description: KILLEEN, Texas (AP) — A pickup truck driver fleeing police careened through the doors of a JCPenney store at a busy Texas mall, injuring five people before he was fatally shot by officers, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Amazon and Starbucks workers are on strike. Trump might have something to do with it
item.description: Amazon delivery drivers and Starbucks baristas are on strike in a handful of U.S. cities as they seek to exert pressure on the two major companies to recognize them as unionized employees or to meet demands for an inaugural labor contract.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, Fox 5
